name: Carribean Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup crushed pineapple, drained (save juice for icing)
recipeInstructions:
Bottom Layer: Combine butter, sugar, and flour. Pack into a 9 x 9 ungreased pan. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
Top Layer: Beat eggs slightly. Stir in remaining ingredients. Spread over bottom layer. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes until medium brown and set. Frost with icing. Cut into squares.
Icing: Combine all ingredients in a bowl. Add more juice if icing is too stiff. Spread over bars. Allow to set before cutting.
Note: I do not like the rum flavouring, so I substitute vanilla in the top layer and the icing.
